docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: How to Correct Visa Data
docs.text: Thank you for helping keep Project Atlas accurate. This guide walks you through fixing incorrect data in under 2 minutes — no coding knowledge required.

docs.title: The Golden Rule
docs.text: All factual changes must be backed by an official source (embassy website, government circular, or consulate portal). PRs without a citation link will be closed.

docs.title: 1. Find the error on the page
docs.text: Visit the country's visa page on the site and identify the incorrect field (e.g. the wrong visa fee).

docs.title: 2. Click "Edit this page"
docs.text:
On the top-right of every country page, there is a pencil (✏️) icon. Click it. You will be taken directly to the raw data file for that country on GitHub (e.g. data/visas/japan.yaml).

You do not need to understand the full file. Simply find the field that is wrong (e.g. visa_fee_inr: 500) and correct it.

docs.title: 3. Propose the change
docs.text: After editing, scroll down and click "Propose changes". Then click "Create pull request".

docs.title: 4. Fill in the PR template
docs.text: You will see a form asking for: - What you changed — a brief description (e.g. "Updated Japan visa fee from ₹500 to ₹800") - Citation URL — the link to the official embassy or government page that confirms the new data

docs.title: 5. Submit and wait
docs.text: Once submitted, the project maintainer will review your PR, verify the citation, and merge it. The live site will automatically update once approved.

docs.title: What You Should NOT Edit
docs.text:
• Files in docs/ (these are auto-generated)
  • gen_pages.py, mkdocs.yml, or any file in templates/
  • Any file outside of data/visas/

Edits to any of these files will be closed without review.

docs.title: Japan Visa Requirements for Indian Citizens
Section A: Authority & Access
docs.text:
• Issuing Authority: Embassy of Japan, New Delhi
  • Authorized Processor: VFS Global
  • Official Portal: Access the official government portal

docs.title: Section C: The Requirement "Hard Facts"
docs.text:
• Visa Fee: ₹800
  • Standard Processing Time: 4 working days
  • Photo Specifications: 35x45mm with a White background.
  • Financial Proof: ITR for the last 3 years and 6 months bank statement.

Data is verified against official consular sources.
